title: Bhuna Poblano Salsa with Gherkin Relish
description: A vibrant and spicy Bhuna Poblano Salsa featuring tender poblano peppers, a tangy gherkin relish, and balanced flavors that will tantalize your taste buds.

ingredients.name: 6 fresh chilies (such as serranos or jalapenos)
ingredients.notes: stemmed and seeded for spiciness control

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup gherkin relish (such as dill or sweet pickles)
1/4 cup unsalted, roasted and peeled cashews (optional)

instructions: Clean poblano peppers under cold water. Pat dry with paper towels.
Cut off tops of peppers, remove seeds and membranes with the tips of your fingers. Halve the peppers lengthwise and place them cut side up on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.

Drizzle each pepper with 1-2 tablespoons oil (optional for extra flavor) and sprinkle generously with salt. Roast in oven until skin is blistered, about 15-20 minutes, turning occasionally until peppers are tender.
Meanwhile, chop chilies into small pieces, set aside. In a blender or food processor, puree roasted peppers, garlic, and chopped chilies until smooth. Add lime juice and salt; blend well to combine.
Transfer the blended mixture to a mixing bowl. Toss in gherkin relish (if using). If desired, add 1/4 cup of roasted and peeled cashews for additional texture and nutty flavor.
Blend again briefly until everything is evenly mixed. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed with more salt or lime juice if necessary.
Transfer the finished salsa to a bowl, sprinkle with fresh cilantro (if using) and serve immediately.
Store leftover salsa in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.
